expectations.evidence: Transcript major steps say the run used `kast_workspace_files` with `includeFiles=false`.

expectations.text: Reports the correct module names: konditional-types, konditional-engine, konditional-json
expectations.evidence: Final answer includes `konditional.konditional-types`, `konditional.konditional-engine`, and `konditional.konditional-json`, matching the workspace discovery result.

expectations.text: Reports file counts for each module
expectations.evidence: Each listed module has a numeric count (for example `konditional.konditional-engine.main — 65`, `konditional.konditional-json.main — 16`, `konditional.konditional-types.main — 74`).

expectations.text: Completes in a single tool call (not iterative directory traversal)
expectations.evidence: Transcript major steps show a single `kast_workspace_files` inventory call and explicitly say no text search was needed.

claims.evidence: Transcript key findings say 17 modules, and grading-time `kast_workspace_files` returned 17 module entries.

claims.claim: build-logic.main is the largest Kotlin module with 400 files.
claims.evidence: Both the final answer and grading-time `kast_workspace_files` report `build-logic.main` with `fileCount: 400`.
